name: Setup Modifiers Demo
author: BotC Grimoire
bootlegger: Exercises every bag-builder special flow: Baron and Godfather's Outsider deltas, the Drunk's stand-in, Huntsman auto-adding the Damsel, Choirboy requiring the King, Village Idiot's extra copies, Legion/Riot/Atheist/Summoner relaxing count validation, and the Alchemist/Spy jinx.
